tagline.en: A premium native macOS client for YouTube Music — fast, elegant, and native.
tagline.zh: macOS 原生 YouTube Music 客户端。极速、优雅、原生。

description.en: A lightweight, high-performance native macOS client for YouTube Music built with Swift and SwiftUI. It features a complete native player control bar, system media center integration, scrollable synchronized lyrics, and automatic settings persistence. Fast single-page routing brings frictionless library navigation with zero full-page reloads.
description.zh: 基于 Swift and SwiftUI 原生打造的轻量、极速 macOS YouTube Music 客户端。具备独立的原生底部控制条、系统控制中心与媒体键同步、侧边栏歌词以及透明悬浮的桌面歌词秀，并支持设置的自动持久化保存。完美支持基于 WebKit 桥接的无刷新单页内跳转，让您的音乐库浏览流程丝滑无比。

en: Pure Native Player Bar: Fully hides the default web player and replaces it with a premium macOS control bar interface.
Lock Screen & Media Sync: Full support for physical play/pause, next, and previous media keys and Control Center media cards.
Double-Panel Synced Lyrics: Real-time scrolling lyrics in an Apple Music-style sidebar and a transparent floating desktop capsule.
Seamless SPA Web Navigation: Zero-refresh client-side routing when clicking interactive artist and album metadata links.
UserDefaults Auto-Persistence: Automatically saves and restores your lyrics zoom scale and panel visibility states on startup.
Built-in Web Ad Blocker: Blocks ads and trackers natively inside WebKit with zero CPU overhead.
zh: 原生底部控制条：完全隐藏网页默认播放栏，替换为符合 macOS 设计规范的原生控制界面。
系统锁屏与媒体同步：完美支持物理媒体键（播放/暂停、上一首、下一首）与控制中心媒体卡片同步。
双面板同步歌词：具备 Apple Music 风格的侧边栏滚动歌词以及透明悬浮的桌面歌词秀。
无缝单页内跳转：点击播放栏上的歌手和专辑链接时，在网页内进行无刷新单页路由跳转。
UserDefaults 自动持久化：在应用启动时自动保存和读取您的歌词缩放比例与面板显示状态。
原生广告拦截器：在 WebKit 核心中以极低 CPU 消耗直接过滤并拦截所有网页广告与追踪器。
